Name: Kosmos
Description: After the Beyonder and the Molecule Man learned that their power derived from the dimension of an unrelated race of beings known as the Beyonders, which is responsible for the power of the Cosmic Cubes, they merged themselves together into a new Cube. Like all Cosmic Cubes, it eventually developed into a sentient being, after which it sent the Molecule Man's self back to Earth. This sentient being, which retained the Beyonder's essence and powers, took on a new female form, and called itself Kosmos.
